question: Return a table showing monthly promo adoption, with columns order_month, total_orders, promo_orders, and promo_order_rate_pct.
sql_query:
WITH monthly_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS order_month,
        o.order_id,
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM core.order_items AS oi 
            WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id AND oi.discount_amount > 0
        ) AS is_promo
    FROM core.orders AS o
)
SELECT 
    order_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS total_orders,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_promo THEN order_id END) AS promo_orders,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_promo THEN order_id END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT order_id), 0), 2) AS promo_order_rate_pct
FROM monthly_orders
GROUP BY order_month
ORDER BY order_month
pandas_sql_query: WITH order_promo_flags AS (SELECT order_id, MAX(CASE WHEN promo_id <> 'NO_PROMO' OR COALESCE(promo_id_2, '') NOT IN ('', 'NO_PROMO') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS used_promo FROM order_items GROUP BY 1) SELECT strftime(CAST(o.order_date AS DATE), '%Y-%m') AS order_month, COUNT(*) AS total_orders, SUM(CASE WHEN p.used_promo = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS promo_orders, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN p.used_promo = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS promo_order_rate_pct FROM orders o JOIN order_promo_flags p USING (order_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
